title: Bailiffs
description: Maintain order in courts of law.

tasks.text: Screen persons entering courthouse using magnetometers, x-ray machines, and other devices to collect and retain unauthorized firearms and other contraband.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Escort prisoners to and from courthouse and maintain custody of prisoners during court proceedings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain order in courtroom during trial and guard jury from outside contact.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide security by patrolling interior and exterior of courthouse and escorting judges and other court employees.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Enforce courtroom rules of behavior and warn persons not to smoke or disturb court procedure.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Arrest persons in court when arrest warrants have been issued.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Report need for police or medical assistance to sheriff's office.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Check courtroom for security and cleanliness and assure availability of sundry supplies, such as notepads, for use by judge, jurors, and attorneys.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Stop people from entering courtroom while judge charges jury.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Screen, control, and handle evidence and exhibits during court proceedings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide assistance to the public, such as directions to court offices.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide jury escort to restaurant and other areas outside of courtroom to prevent jury contact with public.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
